description: Canonical product taxonomy shared by the embedded Tally contact form (tally.so/r/ob17lb), the Tally intake questionnaire (tally.so/r/q4MKYO), the Tally webhook / Relay.app intake flow, and the SharePoint 'Client Pipeline' list (DesiredProductCode / DesiredProductLabel columns). The form's 'Service needed' dropdown uses the labels; the intake flow maps label to code with this table. Codes are stable keys and must never change meaning; labels here, in the Tally forms, and in the SharePoint choice column must stay identical. Any change requires bumping contract_version and updating docs/client-pipeline.md.
